titleStmt.title: Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 611

p.seg: William by the grace of God king of the Scots to all worthy men of his entire land, clerk and lay, greeting.

Let present and future know me to have granted, and by this my charter to have made firm, to Richard, nephew of Simon formerly prior of Coldingham, the sale which Ralph son of Elwald made to him of one toft in Coldingham, and of twenty acres of land; for him and his heirs to hold of the said Ralph and his heirs, as freely and quitly as the charter of the same Ralph lawfully bears witness. Saving my service.
As witnesses, Walter and William my chaplains, Philip de Valognes my chamberlain, William del Bois, Philip of London, Richard Revel.
At Jedburgh on the second day of August.
